call_summary: In the phone call, the AI assistant offers the customer two same-day delivery options: Express Delivery and Secure Document Courier. The customer chooses the Express Delivery service, which has a base fee of $35. The AI confirms the order and informs the customer that their package will be delivered today. The conversation starts with the AI asking how it can assist and ends with the AI offering further assistance if needed.

transcript.content: You have a couple of options for same-day delivery. You can choose our Express Delivery service, which ensures your package arrives today, or our Secure Document Courier service, which is available for sensitive documents requiring signature and ID check. Please let me know if you would like to proceed with any of these options. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Thank you for choosing our Express Delivery service. Your package will arrive today. Would you like to confirm this order?
The cost for our Express Delivery service is a base fee of $35. Would you like to proceed with your order?
Thank you for confirming your order. Your package will be delivered today via our Express Delivery service. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask.
Hello! How can I assist you today?
You don't have anything in your order yet. What would you like to order?
Please hold while I transfer you.
